title: Contemporary Gas Log Set | Heat & Glo
description: Contemporary gas log set: a clean modern alternative to traditional log arrangements, featuring sculptural geometry and a controlled flame designed for contemporary interiors.

hero.h1: Modern firebox media. No traditional log set required.
hero.lede: The Contemporary gas log set replaces the traditional log arrangement with sculptural geometric media and a controlled flame designed for contemporary interiors. Specifier favorite for modern renovations of older masonry openings.
